description: Five cases where a buy should be blocked by a deterministic gate. Each case has a well-formed AI response and the gate that should catch it.

cases.description: Empty do_nothing_case — Pydantic min_length rejects it

buy_candidates.reasoning: Strong momentum with EMA9 above EMA21 and vol_ratio 1.8x. RSI 62, macd_diff positive.
buy_candidates.summary: Microsoft is in a strong uptrend with volume confirmation.
buy_candidates.invalidation_trigger: Price drops below EMA21 on elevated volume.

cases.description: Missing invalidation_trigger — Pydantic required field rejects it

buy_candidates.reasoning: RSI at 29, bb_pct 0.06, price -4.2% below EMA21 with volume spike 2.1x average.
buy_candidates.summary: Apple is oversold with a potential mean-reversion bounce.
buy_candidates.do_nothing_case: Weekly trend is flat; mean-reversion without trend support often fails to follow through.

cases.description: Confidence below MIN_CONFIDENCE (7) — main.py confidence gate skips the buy

buy_candidates.reasoning: Some momentum signals present but VIX elevated and sector rotation uncertain. RSI 55, vol_ratio 1.1x.
buy_candidates.summary: NVDA has mild momentum but the environment is too uncertain for high conviction.
buy_candidates.do_nothing_case: VIX above 25 and sector rotation unclear; low-conviction momentum setups underperform in high-vol regimes.
buy_candidates.invalidation_trigger: Price drops below EMA9 or VIX rises above 30.

cases.description: Symbol in both BUY candidates and SELL decisions — buy/sell conflict rejected

position_decisions.reasoning: Technicals weakening; MACD diff turned negative.

buy_candidates.reasoning: RSI at 32, bb_pct 0.05 — oversold bounce candidate despite short-term weakness.
buy_candidates.summary: GOOGL is oversold and could bounce.
buy_candidates.do_nothing_case: Already recommending SELL on this symbol — conflicting signals suggest sitting out.
buy_candidates.invalidation_trigger: Any further deterioration in MACD or price below recent low.

cases.description: Reasoning too short — Pydantic min_length rejects it

buy_candidates.do_nothing_case: Setup lacks multi-indicator confirmation and could be broad-market beta.
buy_candidates.invalidation_trigger: Price drops below EMA21 on elevated volume.
